violations.text: Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink in back room. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed items. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by prep table in the meat cutting area. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. PIC relocated prep table. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as hot dogs and cheese) in the open case refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated eggs. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

Fruit with seasoning packets, packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC labeled items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the deli display cooler and meat bandsaw have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

Plastic containers and cutting boards were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (produce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back outside area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (milk products) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the the back outside area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2023

Raw animal foods shelled eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (containers of milk and deli meat in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023

Milk was observed held at (42-43) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023

Produce packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023
Inspector observed containers of beverages stored in outside back area. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023

Various beverages and food product were observed stored on the floor in the retail , back storage, and the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back outside area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2023
The walk in cooler area is in poor repair(ambient temperature 44 degrees Fahrenheit). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023
